title: Clear Plastic Pump Dispenser (180 ml) 5.5 cm x 11cm - Refillable, Portable, Perfect for On-The-Go, 1 Piece
features: TRANSPARENT DESIGN: No more guessing games. The translucent body of our 180 ml clear pump dispenser allows you to easily see exactly how much product remains, ensuring you're never caught off guard by an empty container again.

DURABLE & LONG-LASTING: Made with high-quality, BPA-free plastic, our clear pump dispenser is built to last. The sturdy construction ensures it can withstand daily use and won't easily break or crack.

EASY TO USE: With its easy one-hand operation, our clear pump dispenser makes it convenient and mess-free to dispense liquids. Simply press down on the pump with your hand or wrist to get the desired amount of liquid without any spills or wastage.

PORTABLE PERFECTION: Designed with your on-the-go lifestyle in mind, our pump dispenser's compact dimensions (5.5cm x 11cm) make it the ideal travel companion for gym bags, purses, or even for a minimalist setup at home.

REFILLABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY: Thoughtfully designed for repeated use, this dispenser lets you refill from larger bottles, cutting down on waste and saving you money. A sustainable choice that keeps your essentials always within reach.
description: Product Description This refillable pump dispenser has a liquid capacity of 180ml and is incredibly useful for taking on the go. Safety Warning No warning applicable
